title: Zombie Lag Fix
description: A legacy fabric mod that uses the pathfinding throttling code from 1.9.4 to reduce lag caused by zombie pathfinding.
body: A legacy fabric mod that uses the pathfinding throttling code from 1.9.4 to reduce lag caused by zombie pathfinding. Most of the reduction in CPU usage stems from not recalculating paths if the targeted entity (for example a villager) is not moving.
